## [Note]

- dbbot v0.6.0 consolidates the unreleased 0.5.1 work into a single official release focused on exporter registration ergonomics, safer sample inventories, and shipping the bundled exporterregistrar binary from dbbotctl's managed runtime path.

## [Add]

- Add `dbbotctl exporter register` and the `dbbotctl monitoring register` alias so operators can register node, mysql, and router exporters through a stable control-host CLI entrypoint.
- Add doctor and version visibility for the bundled `exporterregistrar` binary so operators can confirm the managed runtime path before registration.

## [Change]

- Move the shipped `exporterregistrar` binary from `mysql_ansible/playbooks/` to `libexec/dbbotctl/` and update the build flow, repository guidance, and runtime path discovery accordingly.
- Normalize MySQL, Monitoring, and ClickHouse sample inventories and InnoDB Cluster Router HA examples to RFC 5737 `192.0.2.0/24` documentation addresses.
- Clarify `dbbotctl env setup` output so operators know it updates `~/.bashrc` and prepends the dbbot `bin/` directory to `PATH`.

## [Fix]

- Refresh exporterregistrar examples and README paths to match the current repository layout and Router registration usage.
- Keep `dbbotctl exporter register` backward-compatible with legacy `mysql_ansible/playbooks/exporterregistrar` installs while preferring the new managed binary path.
